---
title: "Schedule"
---

| Week | Topic | Material |
|---:|---|---|
| 1 | Introduction to process modeling | Lecture 1 |
| 2 | Thermodynamics I: Properties and Pure Fluid | Lecture 2 |
| 3 | Thermodynamics II: Mixtures | Lecture 3 |
| 4 | Energy Balances of multicomponent systems | Lecture 4 |
| 5 | Mixer and splitter models | Lecture 5 |
| 6 | Thermodynamics III: Vapor-liquid equilibrium | Lecture 6 |
| 7 | Flash calculations I: Simplified flash calculations | Lecture 7 |
| 8 | Flash calculations II: Rigorous flash calculations | Lecture 8 |
| 9 | Distillation: Rigorous distillation calculations | Lecture 9 |
| 10 | Fixed-conversion and kinetic-based reactor models | Lecture 10 |
| 11 | Thermodynamics IV: Chemical reaction equilibrium | Lecture 11 |
| 12 | Equilibrium-based reactors | Lecture 12 |
| 13 | Sequential modular approach for process simulation | Lecture 13 |
| 14 | Partition and tearing methods for process simulation | Lecture 14 |
| 15 | Equation-oriented approach for process simulation | Lecture 15 |
| 16 | Process optimization | Lecture 16 |
| 17 | Hybrid modeling and machine learning for process simulation |
